svg.title: Age-1 exclusion workflow — full stage map
svg.desc: Two-column diagram. Left: every standard FEAT pipeline stage from parameter block through reporting. Right: the four age-1 exclusion blocks with dashed connectors showing exact insertion points.

g.text: Age-1 exclusion workflow — full stage map
Left: every standard FEAT pipeline stage. Right: age-1 exclusion blocks with exact insertion points (dashed connectors).

svg.text: Defines file paths, survey IDs, and workflow toggles

g.text: Ingest NASC, biodata, and supporting tables
Load NASC (pre-processed or raw exports) and biodata

text.tspan: Construct haul UID; read strata, mesh, and isobath files

g.text: Length-weight regression and binned weights
Fit length-weight models; compute mean weight per length bin
Required prerequisite for number and weight proportion tables
Counts and proportions
Compute binned counts, number proportions (aged and unaged),
and weight proportions used by inversion and apportionment
Inversion and population estimates
Invert NASC to number density; compute interval abundance
and biomass by sex using number and weight proportions
Coordinate transform and kriging
Transform coordinates; fit variogram; krige onto mesh;
distribute kriged estimates across age, length, and sex bins
Stratified analysis (Jolly-Hampton 1990)
Bootstrap CV estimates for transect and kriged data;
summarize confidence intervals
Report generation and optional comparisons
Generate summary tables and figures via Reporter(...);
if COMPARE: EchoPro vs Echopop diagnostics
CLI trigger
Pass --remove-age1 to dispatcher; resolved in parameter block
REMOVE_AGE1 = cli_utils.get_remove_age1() (defaults to False)
[Optional] Age-1 dominated haul removal
If REMOVE_AGE1 and len(AGE1_DOMINATED_HAULS) > 0:
Filter biodata before stratification joins and binning
Age-1 proportion extraction
If REMOVE_AGE1: slice age_bin=1 from proportion tables

text.tspan: Produces age-1 NASC, number, weight proportions

g.text: Remove age-1 signal from transect estimates
If REMOVE_AGE1: remove age-1 NASC, abundance, biomass

text.tspan: Subtracts age-1 NASC, abundance, biomass from along-transect estimates

g.text: Redistribute kriged age-1 estimates

text.tspan: If REMOVE_AGE1: reallocate "leaked" age-1 estimates over age-2+ bins

g.text: Redistributes estimates for kriged abundance and biomass tables
Parameter block
Data ingestion / preprocessing
Processing / proportions
Model / estimation
Output / reporting
Age-1 exclusion block (if REMOVE_AGE1)
Optional haul filter (if REMOVE_AGE1 and len(AGE1_DOMINATED_HAULS) > 0)
Pipeline flow
Insertion connector (if REMOVE_AGE1)
Insertion connector (optional haul filter)
